item.title: Crit: The Review Loop for Agents
item.description: Crit is a tool designed to close the code review loop for AI-generated code, providing an intuitive and efficient web interface.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: Agent Browser: Browser Navigation for AI Agents
item.description: agent-browser is a tool from Vercel that allows AI agents to navigate the web and perform actions just like a human would, easily integrating with agent frameworks.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: Tailscale Aperture: AI Gateway Without Distributing API Keys
item.description: Tailscale's Aperture centralizes LLM access by eliminating the need to distribute API keys to developers, using Tailscale identity for authentication.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro
